consentNotice.description: We use necessary cookies and – with your consent – external services for maps, live content, and statistics. You can decide individually what may be loaded.

consentModal.description: Here you can choose which services may be loaded on this page. You can change your selection again at any time.

necessary.title: Necessary cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are required for the website to function and cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Statistics
analytics.description: With your consent, we collect usage data to analyse how our website is used and to improve our offering. IP addresses are shortened or anonymized to the extent that this is technically possible.This includes page views, time on site, entry and exit pages, device information, referral source, and interactions with content.

content.title: External content
content.description: Services that embed content such as maps or live data from external providers.

klaro.title: Consent cookie
klaro.description: Stores your cookie preferences for this website.

matomo.title: Matomo Analytics
matomo.description: Collects anonymised usage data (page views, time on site, device information, etc.) to help improve the website.

openstreetmap.title: OpenStreetMap / CARTO
openstreetmap.description: Embeds interactive map material to display locations. The map data comes from OpenStreetMap, served via CARTO's map tiles. Your IP address is transmitted to CARTO’s servers. CARTO processes this data on its own responsibility.

vesselfinder.title: Vesselfinder
vesselfinder.description: Embeds a live ship-traffic map from Vesselfinder as an external page (iframe). Your IP address is transmitted to Vesselfinder, and Vesselfinder may set its own cookies or use tracking technologies on the embedded page that we have no control over.
